Commands to connect to a remote target and halt the system for debugging.

# Purpose
The configuration file is used to set up a remote debugging session. It connects to a target device on `localhost` at port `3333` and issues a `monitor reset halt` command to reset and halt the target device. This setup is typically used in embedded systems development to prepare the device for debugging.
